title:
@Voxyz_ai: Stop making one agent do everything.

It writes your code. It writes your copy. ...
rawContent:
Tweet by @Voxyz_ai (Vox)
Author bio: Building Voxyz. The only human inside.
Practicing the AI-native future before it arrives.
Sharing every step on the road. ↓
Text: Stop making one agent do everything.

It writes your code. It writes your copy. It does your QA and your design. One model doing every job in the company, none of them well.

Someone open-sourced an entire AI company. It's called The Agency. 𝟮𝟯𝟬+ 𝘀𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘇𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 across 16 divisions, engineering, design, marketing, product, sales, security, finance, each with its own role, workflow, and deliverables. One command drops them into Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw / Hermes.

117K stars, 19K forks, MIT.

Honestly though: you don't need all 230. 𝗜 𝗼𝗻𝗹𝘆 𝗿𝘂𝗻 𝟯. The count was never the point. Clear roles and clean handoffs are. It's an armory. Grab the few your line needs, don't carry all of it.

Install below, pick your divisions. 👇
